/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -g  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libplugin-monitor.so -o ../libplugin-monitor.so "CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/monitor.c.o" "CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/monitor_config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/plugin-monitor.dir/mqtt_handle.c.o"   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./:/usr/local/lib:/src/build-native-cm4 ../../libneuron-base.so -lnng /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.a -ldl -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lm -lprotobuf-c -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libxml2.so -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
